name: @madav/core
description: Madav shared brain — pure, provider-agnostic turn-loop helpers and orchestration (grows as legacy migrates).

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/turn-helpers.test.js dist-test/test/router.test.js dist-test/test/recipes.test.js dist-test/test/helpers2.test.js dist-test/test/guard-capability.test.js dist-test/test/chat-loop.test.js dist-test/test/pure-modules.test.js dist-test/test/chat-tools.test.js
